name: Hexellent
author: Poki
description: Hexellent is a puzzle game that blends color matching, hexa sorting, and sliding mechanics into one satisfying experience. Slide and stack colorful hex blocks on a dynamic 3D grid to create perfect gradients and trigger cascading combos. Each move is a test to merge layers wisely and use power-ups to master complex levels. Are you ready to become Hexellent at puzzles? How to play Hexellent? Click and hold to move the hex blocks, and release to drop them. Who created Hexellent? Hexellent is created by Seal Unicorn Games. Play our other games on Poki : Misland , Fluffy Out , Dual Cat , Dual Cat: Max and Rusher Crusher ! How can I play Hexellent for free? You can play Hexellent for free on Poki. Can I play Hexellent on mobile devices and desktop? Hexellent can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
